code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut best_abs = 0
mut best_val = 0
mut have = false

while i < n
  mut b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
  while i < n and (b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13)
    i = i + 1
    b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
  end
  if i < n
    mut sign = 1
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if b == 43
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut d = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
    while i < n and d >= 48 and d <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (d - 48)
      i = i + 1
      d = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        -1
      end
    end
    val = val * sign
    let abs_val = if val < 0
      0 - val
    else
      val
    end
    if not have or abs_val < best_abs
      best_abs = abs_val
      best_val = val
      have = true
    end
  end
end

println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
